classic.notes:
A full touchscreen redesign of Music Boss Classic for Pebble Time 2 and Round 2. Tap, swipe, and flick to control playback over full-screen album art. Three live layouts - Retro+, Modern Classic, and Modern Time - with deep customization from the on-watch menus: text position, multiple fonts and sizes, colours, drop shadow, album-art modes (full / letterbox), scrim, and one-tap presets. Double-press Up/Down to seek; volume ring overlay. Test build - your feedback shapes what ships.

WHAT'S NEW IN 6.105

Quick Actions & buttons:
- New Quick Actions screen: three button-style chips mapped to the Up / Select / Down buttons (also tappable). Set each chip to any action for a mini launch pad. New installs open it with a double-press of the middle button.
- The 2x middle-button (double-press) is configurable again: Scroll Text, Flash Clock, App List, Media Browser, Change Layout, Settings Menu, or Quick Actions.
- The 2x screen-tap and 2x middle-button share one action list (2x tap stays Open Browser by default).
- Change Layout instantly cycles Retro+ -> Modern Classic -> Modern Time.

Menu & labels:
- The General settings menu is organized into sections: Layout & Display, Touch Gestures, Buttons & Motion, Quick Actions, and About.
- Clearer setting names and descriptions throughout.

Fixes:
- Retro+ background (Art Colour / Black / White) now saves across relaunches.
- Scroll Text now actually scrolls the title on the Modern UI, even when Auto Scroll Text is off.
- The volume readout no longer briefly pops up when you open the app.
- The action bar hides a bit quicker.

browser.notes: The Media Browser is now fully touch-enabled on Pebble Time 2 and Round 2 - every menu is tap and scroll navigable.
